spells.name: Animate Dead
spells.material: a drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust

spells.name: Antipathy/Sympathy
spells.material: a mix of vinegar and honey

spells.name: Arcane Lock
spells.material: gold dust worth 25+ GP, which the spell consumes

spells.name: Astral Projection
spells.material: for each of the spell's targets, one jacinth worth 1,000+ GP and one silver bar worth 100+ GP, all of which the spell consumes

spells.name: Augury
spells.material: special marked sticks, bones, cards, or other divinatory tokens worth 25+ GP

spells.name: Awaken
spells.material: an agate worth 1,000+ GP, which the spell consumes

spells.name: Befuddlement
spells.material: a key ring with no keys

spells.name: Circle of Death
spells.material: the powder of a crushed black pearl worth 500+ GP

spells.name: Clairvoyance
spells.material: a focus worth 100+ GP, either a jeweled horn for hearing or a glass eye for seeing

spells.name: Clone
spells.material: a diamond worth 1,000+ GP, which the spell consumes, and a vessel worth 2,000+ GP that is large enough to hold the creature being cloned

spells.name: Comprehend Languages
spells.material: a pinch of soot and salt

spells.name: Cone of Cold
spells.material: a small crystal or glass cone

spells.name: Conjure Barrage
spells.material: a Melee or Ranged weapon worth at least 1 CP

spells.name: Contingency
spells.material: a gem-incrusted statuette of yourself worth 1,500+ GP

spells.name: Continual Flame
spells.material: ruby dust worth 50+ GP, which the spell consumes

spells.name: Control Water
spells.material: a mixture of water and dust

spells.name: Create or Destroy Water
spells.material: a mix of water and sand

spells.name: Create Undead
spells.material: one 150+ GP black onyx stone for each corpse

spells.name: Death Armor
spells.material: an onyx worth 50+ GP, which the spell consumes
